summary: Frontend translation testing for POS, Tables, Ratings, Expenses, and SmartReports pages. All translation fixes from iteration_73 have been verified and are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All t() wrapping fixes have been correctly applied
Product names (عصير، شاي، قهوة) remain in Arabic as expected - these are database data, not UI labels
SmartReports shows 'غير معروف' (Unknown) for some products - this is database data issue, not translation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All translation issues from iteration_73 have been fixed. The t() function is now correctly applied to: 1) POS.js - cat.name and section tabs, 2) Tables.js - section headers and dropdown options, 3) Expenses.js - getCategoryName function and all category dropdowns. Product names from database remain in their original language as expected.

pages_tested.POS: PASS - Categories (Beverages, Main Dishes, Appetizers, Desserts), Table sections (Indoor, Outdoor), Order types (Dine In, Takeaway, Delivery), Payment methods (Cash, Card, Credit) all translated
pages_tested.Tables: PASS - Page title (Tables Management), Section headers (Indoor, Outdoor), Status labels (Available, Occupied, Reserved), Buttons (Add Table, Open Order, Delete) all translated
pages_tested.Ratings: PASS - Page title (Customer Ratings), Card titles (Detailed Ratings, Ratings Distribution), Labels (Food Quality, Delivery Speed, Service Quality), Messages (No ratings yet) all translated
pages_tested.Expenses: PASS - Page title (Daily Expenses), Category dropdown (All Categories, Rent, Utilities, Gas, Salaries, Maintenance, Supplies, Marketing, Transport, Other), Section titles (By Category, Expenses Log) all translated
pages_tested.SmartReports: PASS - Page title (Smart Reports), Stats labels (Customers, Average Order, Number of Orders, Total Sales), Section titles (Best Selling Products, Sales by Hour) all translated
